title: Movement Analysis I
text:
library(dplyr)
library(sf)
library(tmap)

training_dataset <- read_sf("Data/tracks_1.gpkg", layer = "training") |>
  mutate(data = "training")

testing_dataset <- read_sf("Data/tracks_1.gpkg", layer = "testing") |>
  mutate(data = "testing")

validation_dataset <- read_sf("Data/tracks_1.gpkg", layer = "validation") |>
  mutate(data = "validation")

full_dataset <- bind_rows(training_dataset, testing_dataset, validation_dataset)

full_dataset |>
  tm_shape() +
  tm_dots() +
  tm_basemap("CartoDB.Positron")









|---------|---------|---------|---------|
=========================================

title: Movement Analysis I
Movement Analysis I
Movement Analysis I
text:
Neural Network

library(nnet)
library(caret)

model <- nnet(
  mode ~ .,
  data = point_training,
  size = 5,
  maxit = 200,
  trace = FALSE
)

model_pred <- predict(model, point_testing, type = "class")

mean(model_pred == point_testing$mode)

[1] 0.5368374

confusionMatrix(as.factor(model_pred), point_testing$mode)

Confusion Matrix and Statistics

Predict Validation

val_pred <- predict(model, point_validation, type = "class")

point_validation$mode <- val_pred

validation_pred_full_dataset <- validation_dataset |>
  mutate(row_id = row_number()) |>
  left_join(
    point_validation |> mutate(row_id = row_number()),
    by = "row_id"
  )

validation_pred_full_dataset |>
  tm_shape() +
  tm_dots(col = "mode", palette = "Set1", size = 0.001) +
  tm_basemap("CartoDB.Positron")
